leadText: The Mawilite (Japanese: クチートナイト Kucheatnite) is a type of held item introduced in Generation VI. It is the Mega Stone that allows Mawile to Mega Evolve into Mega Mawile.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Mawile , the Mawilite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Mawile if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Mawilite from Mawile. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Mawile, the Mawilite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Mawile when it performs a Spectacular Talent during a Pokémon Contest Spectacular if its Trainer has a Key Stone. Mawile will remain a Mega Mawile until the Talent Round ends.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Mawile , the Mawilite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Mawile if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Mawilite from Mawile.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y One variety of the mysterious Mega Stones. Have Mawile hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Mawile hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. ZA One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. A Mawile holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.
